action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 7 achieved avg_precision=0.1767 with a 5-layer, 300-dim MPNN trained for 10 epochs. Validation AP was still increasing at epoch 10 (0.1885), indicating underfitting rather than overfitting. The model is very small (~3M params) and can be scaled up significantly. Analysis: Key improvements to try now are (1) increase model capacity (hidden_dim 400, 6 layers), (2) replace BatchNorm with LayerNorm which is more stable for graph batches, (3) switch message aggregation from sum to mean to reduce variance, (4) add gradient clipping and AdamW with cosine annealing, (5) train longer (20 epochs) since validation loss was still improving. These changes are low-risk and should yield a sizable boost. Decision: Update model.py and train.py with the above changes, keep predict.py unchanged, train for 20 epochs, and submit eval.
